### ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the team’s contribution rules
- [ ] I have added tests for new methods/functions
- [ ] I have run the compliance checker (`python tools/lint_checker.py`)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation index (`python tools/documentation_updater.py`)
- [ ] All methods are commented line-by-line
- [ ] No legacy code was modified directly

### 📌 Description of Contribution

_Explain what your change does and why it's necessary._

### 🧪 Testing

_How did you test it? Screenshots, logs, etc._
